description: Add Qdrant to docker-compose and expand @quant/search package with vector-client, hybrid-search, query-parser, permission-filter, reranker, facets, and proactive search modules
steps: Add qdrant service to docker-compose.dev.yml with image qdrant/qdrant:latest, ports 6333:6333 and 6334:6334, volume qdrant_data:/qdrant/storage, and add qdrant_data to volumes section

Create packages/search/src/services/vector-client.ts - Qdrant wrapper class with methods: createCollection(name, vectorSize), upsertPoints(collection, points[]{id, vector, payload}), search(collection, vector, limit, filter?), deletePoints(collection, ids[]), getCollectionInfo(collection). Use Zod schemas for all inputs. Define QdrantPoint, VectorSearchResult types.
Create packages/search/src/services/vector-client.test.ts - Mock Qdrant HTTP client, test all CRUD operations and search with filters

Create packages/search/src/services/hybrid-search.ts - HybridSearchEngine class that takes SearchClient (BM25) and VectorClient instances. Method hybridSearch(query, embedding, options) runs both searches in parallel, normalizes scores to 0-1 range, applies fusion weights (default 0.7*BM25 + 0.3*vector), returns merged sorted results. Types: HybridSearchOptions (weights, limit, scopes, filters), HybridSearchResult.
Create packages/search/src/services/hybrid-search.test.ts - Test score normalization, fusion weighting, deduplication of results appearing in both, empty results handling

Create packages/search/src/services/query-parser.ts - QueryParser class that parses natural language queries into structured search parameters. Uses pattern matching (regex-based for testability) to extract: type filters ('emails', 'messages', 'files'), person references ('from John'), date ranges ('last month', 'yesterday', 'this week'), and keyword terms. Returns ParsedQuery { type?: string, filters: ParsedFilter[], keywords: string[], dateRange?: DateRange }. Define Zod schemas.

Create packages/search/src/services/query-parser.test.ts - Test parsing 'emails from John last month' -> correct structured output, test various date patterns, test type detection, test plain keyword fallback

Create packages/search/src/services/permission-filter.ts - PermissionFilter class with method filterResults(results, userId, userPermissions). Checks each result's ownerUserId and visibility against requesting user's permissions. Supports visibility levels: public, private, shared (with list of userIds). Defense in depth - removes any results the user shouldn't see post-query.
Create packages/search/src/services/permission-filter.test.ts - Test that private docs are filtered for other users, public docs pass through, shared docs visible to listed users

Create packages/search/src/services/reranker.ts - CohereReranker class with method rerank(query, documents, topN). Wraps Cohere rerank-v3 API call. Takes top-50 candidates, returns top-10 reranked by relevance. Uses Zod for request/response validation. Falls back to original ordering on API failure.
Create packages/search/src/services/reranker.test.ts - Mock Cohere API, test reranking reorders results, test fallback on error, test topN parameter

Create packages/search/src/services/facets.ts - SearchFacetAggregator class that builds per-app facet definitions. Method buildFacets(results, scope) returns aggregated facets (type counts, date histogram, sender distribution). Uses existing FacetDefinition/FacetResult types from types.ts.
Create packages/search/src/services/facets.test.ts - Test facet aggregation across mixed result types

Create packages/search/src/services/proactive.ts - ProactiveSearch class with method getRelatedItems(context: ProactiveContext). Given a document context (type, content snippet, metadata), finds related items across all indexes using vector similarity. Returns cross-app results. Types: ProactiveContext, ProactiveResult.
Create packages/search/src/services/proactive.test.ts - Test that opening an email context returns related docs/messages/files, test empty context returns empty results

Update packages/search/src/index.ts barrel to export all new modules: VectorClient, HybridSearchEngine, QueryParser, PermissionFilter, CohereReranker, SearchFacetAggregator, ProactiveSearch, and their types
Update packages/search/package.json to add dependency on @quant/ai workspace:* (for embeddings/reranking routing)
acceptance_criteria: VectorClient provides createCollection, upsertPoints, search, deletePoints with Zod-validated inputs
HybridSearchEngine fuses BM25 + vector results with configurable weights defaulting to 0.7/0.3
QueryParser correctly parses 'emails from John last month' into structured query with type=email, from=John, dateRange for last month
PermissionFilter blocks private documents from unauthorized users
CohereReranker reorders top-50 to top-10 and gracefully falls back on failure
ProactiveSearch returns cross-app related items given a document context
All new files have comprehensive .test.ts files
NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run passes for all new test files
verification: NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run packages/search/ -- should pass all tests
Check docker-compose.dev.yml has qdrant service with correct ports and volume
findings: All 89 tests pass. Pre-commit hooks require NODE_OPTIONS="" and commit headers must be under 100 chars. Prettier formatting applied via lint-staged. Query parser extracts dates before person references to avoid regex overlap. BM25 score normalization uses min-max scaling which can produce 0 for the lowest-scored item when range > 0.
